# Louis Le

> AI infrastructure engineer specializing in multi-agent orchestration and LLM-powered financial systems. UCL Computer Science.

Louis Le is a software engineer based in London. He builds production systems at the intersection of AI and finance. Currently co-founder and CTO of cf0.ai, a financial intelligence platform with multi-agent orchestration across 31 financial APIs.

## Projects

- [Grounded](https://github.com/lnv-louis/grounded-fact-checking): AI fact-checking platform. 1st place Lovable Hackathon. Multi-stage prompt chain with Perplexity Sonar Pro tracing claims through citation hierarchies.
- [Dex](https://github.com/lnv-louis/dex-face-recognition): Live facial recognition for networking events. Facenet512 embeddings with RetinaFace detection. Sub-2-second identification.
- [Homiq](https://github.com/lnv-louis/homiq-property-search-engine): AI property search engine. Infinite zoomable canvas with server-side streaming from Perplexity Sonar Pro.

## Research

- [Cancer Subtype Classification](https://lenguyenvu.com/#research): Random Forest and RBF-SVM models on the GSE13159 clinical genomics dataset. 82% accuracy.
- [Comparative Sentiment Analysis](https://lenguyenvu.com/#research): Bidirectional LSTM vs LinearSVC on FinancialPhraseBank. LinearSVC achieved F1 of 0.74.
